title: Fortnite Knocked (Loud)
description: Be treated to an incredibly loud version of the Fortnite knocked down sound when you die.
body:
Dying is pretty... meh. If you want to shatter your eardrums (okay, not really) with the knocked down sound from Fortnite whenever you or someone else dies, this is your pack. Also includes custom death messages similar to the Fortnite elimination feed.

Sound used:
